name: Permanent back damage from job, what payout?
description: Impairment % x wage max + future meds[1].

mainEntity.name: Permanent back damage from job, what payout?

acceptedAnswer.text: Impairment % x wage max + future meds[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Lump sum based on impairment rating (e.g., 5-20% whole person for disc issues) times state max weekly rate.** Utah adds interest[1]. **Key factors:** AMA guides rating, future care. **Practical guidance:** Independent rating post-MMI, negotiate settlement. $20k-$150k common[1]. **Attorney maximizes.**
